# JkSoft

> JkSoft is a next-generation technology company focused on multi-tenant SaaS platforms and AI Search Engine Optimization (AIO).

## Core Identity
- **Organization**: JkSoft
- **Core Product**: Vibe Platform (Multi-tenant SaaS)
- **Innovative Service**: AI Optimization (AIO)
- **Representative**: Jeong Hyoung Jae (Tech Lead / Software Architect)

## Services and Solutions

### 1. Vibe Platform (Multi-tenant SaaS)
A scalable, modular SaaS platform architecture designed for business growth.
- Multi-tenant data isolation
- Modular service architecture
- High-performance admin dashboard

### 2. AIO (AI Optimization)
Strategic content structuring for Generative AI search visibility.
- Schema.org structured data automation
- Semantic context authority building
- AI search result citation strategy (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity)

## Human Behind JkSoft
- **Name**: Jeong Hyoung Jae
- **Profile**: 20+ years of enterprise system architecture experience (Korean Air, Samsung SDS, Hyundai Group).
- **Vision**: Connecting humans via technology and growing together via platforms.
